Aligning vision and user needs to drive growth and simplify complexity
For over a decade, shaping digital products that drive growth, clarity, and business outcomes for global brands and startups.

I solve complex challenges with elegant, data-driven solutions that have scaled to millions of users and generated tens of millions in revenue. Embracing the new AI era, I integrate generative intelligence and automation to craft tomorrow's products today.
Available for U.S. engagements via B2B contracting. B-1/B-2 visa (business travel)

Started as a graphic designer 20 years ago, then moved by a passion for creating experiences, became a product designer in 2013. I've shaped digital experiences across Brazil, Europe, and the US. I love breaking down complex systems: from high-fidelity prototypes to user-centered solutions.

I believe in the power of collaboration and enjoy working closely with cross-functional teams to bring ideas to life. My goal is to create products that not only meet user and business needs but make a significant change in this world.
Outside of design, I enjoy exploring new technologies, following aviation, and indulging my passion for cars. My dog keeps me company during workdays, adding joy to my daily routine.

Redesigned search and filters end-to-end. Contributed to an AI-powered conversational search MVP alongside engineering.

Supported $3M+ in revenue and $5M+ in funding while working directly with the CEO on product vision, investor decks, and business design strategy. Led design for gamification, AI personalization, loyalty systems, and real-time fan experiences.

FanFest had no established design system, UX direction, or product language when I joined. The challenge was to go from zero to a platform credible enough to sign PSG, ManCity, NBA, and Sky Sports — and to do that while the product was still being validated.

Established the full design system and UX/UI direction from scratch. Designed gamification, AI personalization, loyalty systems, and real-time fan experience flows. Worked directly with the CEO on product vision, investor decks, and business design strategy — from MVP through fundraising.
30M+ remote fans engaged on the platform. $3M+ in customer revenue. $5M+ in funding secured. Up to 30% paid conversion in early pilots.

Rental storefront pages had fragmented, inconsistent structure that was depressing conversion and making it impossible for the marketing team to update content without engineering. Onboarding and payment flows had friction points driving landlord churn.

Redesigned all storefront pages from scratch — simplified structure, unified components into a reusable library. Built a lead-generation feature connecting renters interested in buying their first home. Improved onboarding and leasing/payment workflows to reduce friction across landlord experiences.
70% increase in user conversion. Marketing team now updates pages 84% faster without engineering dependencies. Lead-gen solution generating 10K+ qualified leads per month across 5M active users.

Mobile drop-off in the Online Store had reached ~90%, stalling the product as a business asset. Rental lead submissions were flat despite high traffic. The UpNest CRM had structural and hierarchy issues that slowed agents' daily workflows across the funnel.

Worked across three teams simultaneously. On Rentals, improved search and filters and co-built an AI-powered conversational search MVP. On Online Store, ran heuristic analysis and user interviews to diagnose adoption issues and drove the redesign from the ground up. On UpNest, redesigned the CRM structure, hierarchy, and interaction logic across platforms — with a focus on contextual actions and lead segmentation.

Rental unique lead submissions up +12.5%, with 7% more qualified leads from improved search. Online Store mobile drop-off dropped from ~90% to under ~10%. Agents on the redesigned UpNest CRM completing tasks ~40–60% faster.
